get.description: Get a specific company by ID
Get historical calculations for a company across eligible documents.
Test endpoint for company historical calculations (no auth required).
Get financial assumptions for a company

post.description: Update financial assumptions for a company

get.description: Get financial model (DCF) for a company

post.description:
Upload multiple documents (up to 10) and process them asynchronously.
Returns immediately with document IDs. Processing happens in background.

TEST ENDPOINT: Upload multiple documents without authentication.
Only available when DEBUG=true or ENVIRONMENT=development.

get.description:
Get list of documents currently being processed (uploading, classifying, or indexing).
Used to show upload progress in the UI.

schema.title: Response Get Upload Progress Api Documents Upload Progress Get

get.description:
TEST ENDPOINT: Get upload progress without authentication.
Only available when DEBUG=true or ENVIRONMENT=development.

schema.title: Response Get Upload Progress Test Api Documents Upload Progress Test Get

post.description:
TEST ENDPOINT: Upload a PDF document without authentication.
Only available when DEBUG=true or ENVIRONMENT=development.

get.description:
TEST ENDPOINT: List documents without authentication.
Only available when DEBUG=true or ENVIRONMENT=development.

schema.title: Response List Documents Test Api Documents Test Get

get.description: List documents, optionally filtered by company. Shows all documents (shared dashboard).

schema.title: Response List Documents Api Documents  Get

post.description: Create a new document record (legacy endpoint - use upload endpoint instead)

get.description: Get a specific document by ID (shared dashboard - all users can see all documents)

delete.description: Delete a document (useful for canceling duplicate uploads).

patch.description: Update a document (shared dashboard - any user can update)

get.description: Serve the PDF file for a document (shared dashboard - all users can access all documents)

TEST ENDPOINT: Serve the PDF file for a document without authentication.
Only available when DEBUG=true or ENVIRONMENT=development.

post.description:
Upload a PDF document, classify it, check for duplicates, and return classification results.
User must confirm before document is indexed.

TEST ENDPOINT: Confirm document upload without authentication.
Only available when DEBUG=true or ENVIRONMENT=development.
This creates the document record and starts the indexing process.
If existing_document_id is provided, replaces that document instead.

Confirm document upload and proceed with indexing.
This creates the document record and starts the indexing process asynchronously.
If existing_document_id is provided, replaces that document instead of creating a new one.

Replace existing document and proceed with indexing.
Called when user confirms "Replace & Index" for a duplicate document.

Re-run indexing for an already indexed document.
Deletes existing chunk embeddings and re-indexes the document.

TEST ENDPOINT: Replace and index without authentication.
Only available when DEBUG=true or ENVIRONMENT=development.

TEST ENDPOINT: Re-run indexing without authentication.
Only available when DEBUG=true or ENVIRONMENT=development.

delete.description:
TEST ENDPOINT: Delete document without authentication.
Only available when DEBUG=true or ENVIRONMENT=development.

Permanently delete a document and all associated data including financial statements.
This is a destructive operation that cannot be undone.
TEST ENDPOINT: Permanently delete a document without authentication.

get.description: Get financial statement processing progress with milestones
Get document status including indexing progress (shared dashboard - all users can see all documents)
TEST ENDPOINT: Get financial statement processing progress without authentication

TEST ENDPOINT: Get document status without authentication.
Only available when DEBUG=true or ENVIRONMENT=development.

Get all chunks for an indexed document.
Returns chunk text, page ranges, and metadata for each chunk.

TEST ENDPOINT: Get all chunks for an indexed document without authentication.
Only available when DEBUG=true or ENVIRONMENT=development.

post.description:
Trigger balance sheet processing for a document.
Only processes earnings announcements, quarterly filings, and annual reports.
Re-run entire financial statement pipeline (balance sheet then income statement sequentially)
TEST ENDPOINT: Re-run entire financial statement pipeline without authentication

delete.description: Delete all financial statements (balance sheet and income statement) for a document
TEST ENDPOINT: Delete all financial statements without authentication

get.description:
Get balance sheet data for a document.
Returns three possible states:
1. Balance sheet exists - returns balance sheet data
2. Processing - returns processing status with milestones
3. Does not exist and not processing - returns 404

post.description:
Trigger income statement processing for a document.
Only processes earnings announcements, quarterly filings, and annual reports.
Re-run income statement extraction (extraction + additional items + classification)

get.description:
Get income statement data for a document.
Returns three possible states:
1. Income statement exists - returns income statement data
2. Processing - returns processing status with milestones
3. Does not exist and not processing - returns 404
Get historical calculations for a document.

post.description: Recalculate historical calculations for a document.

get.description: Test endpoint: Get historical calculations for a document (no auth required).

post.description: Test endpoint: Recalculate historical calculations (no auth required).
